---
title: "Lessons Learnt"
author: "Elsen Soh, Gloria Phua, Jaxsen Tee"
---

\## Challenges Faced\
\
Describe the difficulties encountered during the project.\
\
\## Skills Gained\
\
Explain what your team learnt from the project.\
\
\## Future Improvements\
\
Mention what you would improve if you had more time or more advanced tools.
